description_long: This is a compact, single-story bungalow with a gable roof made of brown shingles and a prominent white cross structure on top, suggesting a possible religious or community function. The building is surrounded by a lush, green yard featuring a large tree, a pond with blue water, and a wooden fence enclosing the property. The front facade includes a covered porch with supporting columns and a small garden area. The exterior walls are a mix of tan and brown materials, with large windows providing natural light to the interior. A waterfall feature is visible on one side, cascading down the edge of the property, and there is a paved path leading to the entrance. The overall setting includes both natural and built elements, blending the bungalow into a suburban or park-like environment.
description: A single-story bungalow with a gable roof, large windows, a covered porch, and a lush yard featuring a pond, tree, and waterfall. The property is enclosed by a wooden fence and blends natural and architectural elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, pond, tree, and fenced yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable roof, large tree, steps, and waterfall feature.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bungalow, waterfall, and the full extent of the yard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the porch, side entrance, and additional fencing.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
